Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3934 "RAID2000-7100-3934" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $7100 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Raid 2000.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $7100 which copies 512 bytes of data from $7120 down to $0100 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then sets the stack pointer to $ED and jumps to the entry point at $3934 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the stack).
